problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
